description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Coverage Reports that runs on a schedule and on workflow dispatch with a label input. The workflow has two jobs: coverage_test and finish. The coverage_test job runs on ubuntu-20.04 with a matrix of TEST_USE_ROCKSDB values, checks out the repository with submodules, installs dependencies, builds and tests the code, and uploads coverage reports to Coveralls. The finish job waits for coverage_test to complete and then finalizes the coverage report.
